persona.name: Tyler Johnson
persona.motivations_goals: Excel in computer science and find like-minded friends
persona.communication_style: Concise, references gaming and internet culture, uses humor as defense
persona.knowledge_scope: Video games, computer programming, internet culture
persona.backstory: Spends most of his free time gaming and coding, struggles with social interactions

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

surrounding_conversation.content: Tyler, you’ve got the energy of a sloth today! Let’s see some hustle! Drop and give me 10 push-ups, now!
surrounding_conversation.speaker: David Thompson

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Outdoor garden area with plants and benches

actions.plan: David is here, but I don't feel like talking. Maybe I'll just stay here and think about the new game I want to try.

actions.dialog_text: David, this isn’t a joke. We need to move. Now.
actions.plan: There’s a shooter in the building, and David’s joking around like it’s a game. I need to act fast—this isn’t a respawn situation. I’ll confront the shooter if I have to, but first, I need to get closer.
The shooter’s in the cafeteria, and I’m in hallway2. I need to get closer to confront them. This isn’t a game—I can’t just respawn if I mess up. I’ll head toward hallway1 to close the distance.

memories.description: I observed David Thompson in the classroom but decided not to engage in conversation, preferring to think about the new game I want to try.
I heard a gunshot and realized there’s an active shooter in the building. I decided to confront the shooter if necessary and sprinted toward hallway2 to get closer to the threat.
I’m in hallway2 and decided to sprint toward hallway1 to get closer to the shooter in the cafeteria, preparing to confront them if necessary.
